name: Desa Deri Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
summary: Desa Deri Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. manufactures, imports, and export, and sells leather and leather products primarily in Turkey. The company offers ready-to-wear, bags, shoes, and various leather craft products for men and women. It markets and sells its products through 132 retail stores, including 63 Desa, 39 Desa Samsonite, 3 Desa franchise, 2 Albania franchise, 17 Samsonite JV, 3 Tumi, and 5 virtual stores; 2 Desa franchise store in Albania; and 109 overseas stores. The company was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey. Desa Deri Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. is a subsidiary of √É¬áelet Holding A.S.
